title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1: Software Factories & Keynotes
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 is a major in-person AI engineering conference held June 30, 2026 in San Francisco at Moscone West. Day 1 programming includes keynotes and main-stage sessions focused on software factories and AI engineering topics.
writeup: This video streams Day 1 of the AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, held at Moscone West in San Francisco on June 30, 2026, with keynotes and main-stage sessions running from 9 AM to 5:30 PT. The programming centers on software factories and AI engineering, organized across multiple session blocks. The coverage documents the conference's opening day for those tracking the field's main industry gathering.
